query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_rows,
  COUNT(DISTINCT phone) as unique_phones,
  COUNT(*) - COUNT(DISTINCT phone) as duplicate_rows,
  MAX(cnt) as max_bookings_per_customer
FROM (
  SELECT phone, COUNT(*) as cnt 
  FROM completed_jobs 
  GROUP BY phone
) t;

  COUNT(*) - COUNT(DISTINCT phone) as duplicate_rows,
